_note: Batch undated_2: documented parents (and full siblings where documented) for married-in spouses lacking a parsed year. New nodes prefixed SPH_. Existing ids referenced as strings. Achaeus-elder union (SPB_ACHAEUS_ELDER + SPB_ACHAEUS_ELDER_W) already carries ATT_ANTIOCHIS from batch b1; Laodice I + her brothers append to it. Jubilees / traditional links are flagged in-label.
